description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by large windows and vertical green landscaping elements. The house features multiple rooms arranged around a central open living area, with several outdoor patios and garden spaces integrated into the design. The main entrance is marked by a set of tall, narrow windows and a prominent doorway, flanked by decorative columns and greenery. The rear and side yards are landscaped with hedges, small trees, and paved walkways, providing private outdoor seating areas. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring open living spaces and multiple outdoor patios.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled perspective, highlighting the main entrance, central living area, and adjacent garden spaces.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with tall windows, the main entryway, and a row of vertical landscaping elements.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, revealing private patios, garden beds, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a look at the back and side, showing multiple rooms, outdoor seating areas, and the integration of greenery along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with tall glass doors, vertical windows, flanking columns, and landscaped approach
